chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-1233 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. ------ 01.10.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Seemingly counsel for the petitioner is unaware of the facts of the case and therefore is not in a position to argue the case properly. Accordingly, this petition is hereby dismissed with no order as to costs. Judge Judge Manzoor
